why_it_matters: An additional started antihypertensive alters the regimen and, alongside the documented lisinopril/HCTZ and a low office BP of 106/67, raises hypotension risk if the medication list is inaccurate.
This visit centers on social needs, so documenting the structured PRAPARE findings (housing insecurity, unmet utilities, insurance status) completes the SDOH assessment and guides resource referrals.
